title: Employees with Salary Records
description: Write a SQL query that returns employee records only when they have a salary record.
checklist: Join the tables using INNER JOIN
Return only employees with salary records
detailedInstructions: Step 1: Select employee fields from EmployeeDetails
Step 2: Use INNER JOIN to connect EmployeeSalary
Step 4: Return only matched employee records
starterCode:
-- 1: Select employee fields from EmployeeDetails
-- 2: Inner join EmployeeSalary on EmpId
-- 3: Return matched employee records

hints.code:
FROM EmployeeDetails ED
INNER JOIN EmployeeSalary ES ON ED.EmpId = ES.EmpId;
